  140.5  281.2   45.8   40.2   64.4   47.3      2.6     4.9    0.5     20  55.06   6.11   0.81 101.52 152.45 140.20   0.96  11.25    0.8      -  UNK  unmatched peak (shower candidate)

  140.5  211.2   -2.8  353.5   -5.8   38.9      2.0     3.3    0.6     14  41.30   2.21   0.97  18.76 167.68 307.69   0.06   4.35    2.8      -  SCQ Southern chi Aquariids
  140.5  164.2   77.8  282.4   55.8   21.7      1.0     3.3    0.3     14  24.44   3.42   0.68  34.18 196.42 140.43   1.00   5.84    2.6      -  UNK  unmatched peak (shower candidate)
  140.5  272.2   10.8   47.2   28.8   69.9      2.9     3.1    1.0     12  69.74  10.76   0.86 160.58 171.10 140.25   1.00  20.51   -0.4      -  BAQ beta Aquariids
#
# Slon : Solar longitude [deg]
# ll_0 : Sun centred ecliptic longitude [deg]
# Beta : Ecliptic latitude [deg]
# RA : Right ascension [deg]
# Dec : Declination [deg]
# vg : Geocentric velocity [km/s]
# wc : Wavelet coefficient
# xsig : Number of std devs wc is above the median at ll_0, beta, and vg through the year
# wc_s : Standard deviation of the wavelet coefficient at ll_0, beta and vg through the year
# r_cnt : Number of radiants used to calculate the wavelet coefficient
#
# Standard deviation of single wc is given by:
# 0.04987 * sqrt(r_cnt) / angular probe size[radians] / sqrt(velocity probe size[km/s])
# (spatial probe = 1.0 deg, velocity probe = 5.0 %)
